description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly pink color scheme and wavy line patterns on its side panels. The cabinet has a large, flat display screen set into a recessed front, with a control panel below that includes two joysticks and multiple colored buttons, suggesting support for two players. The marquee at the top displays the game's title, 'KURY'S TRAVEL', in stylized white text on a pink background. The side panels are decorated with the same game title and wavy graphics, giving the cabinet a retro, playful appearance. The back of the cabinet is plain black, while the front lower section includes a visible coin slot. The overall build appears to be made of wood or MDF with a laminate finish, typical of arcade machines.
description: A pink upright arcade game cabinet with wavy side graphics, a large screen, dual joysticks, and a marquee reading 'KURY'S TRAVEL'. The front features a coin slot and a colorful control panel.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the pink wavy pattern, 'KURY'S TRAVEL' logo, and the profile of the control panel and screen.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features or graphics.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same pink wavy pattern and 'KURY'S TRAVEL' logo, plus the control panel and screen profile.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the display screen, dual joystick control panel with colored buttons, marquee artwork, and a coin slot at the bottom.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and six colored buttons arranged in two clusters, suitable for two players side-by-side, with a simple color-coded scheme
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; pink background with white stylized 'KURY'S TRAVEL' text, matching the side panel theme, no additional imagery
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Pink wavy line pattern with the 'KURY'S TRAVEL' logo in white, no additional imagery or decals
